release_notes: Session restore actually works now. Graceful chrome shutdown was using 'taskkill /PID /T'; the /T flag recursively WM_CLOSEs the whole process tree at once, so renderers died before the browser process could walk its tab list and write Current Session -> Last Session. Dropped /T so WM_CLOSE hits only the browser process; it runs its normal close path (saves session, asks renderers to shut down cleanly) before exiting. Force-fallback still uses /T /F. Profile editor X-button moved to the actual top-right corner (was floating mid-dialog at the boundary between content and summary columns). About page launcher block shows green check-mark badge when up-to-date, matching the engine block's badge.
